name: HMS Radiant (FY 022)
events: 9 Jan 1941 HMS Unbeaten (Lt. E.A. Woodward, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Portsmouth with HMS Radiant (Lt.Cdr.(Retd.) A.J. Brewster, RN) and HMS Kingston Amber (A/Skr.Lt. J. Flett, RNR). (1)
24 Apr 1941 HrMs O 9 (Lt. H.A.W. Goossens, RNN) conducted RD/F. trials off Holyhead with HMS Radiant (Cdr.(Retd.) J.W. Hoskyns, RN). (2)
25 Apr 1941 HrMs O 9 (Lt. H.A.W. Goossens, RNN) conducted RD/F trials off Holyhead with HMS Radiant (Cdr.(Retd.) J.W. Hoskyns, RN). (2)
3 May 1941 HrMs O 9 (Lt. H.A.W. Goossens, RNN) conducted R.D.F. trials off Holyhead with HMS Radiant (Cdr.(Retd.) J.W. Hoskyns, RN). (2)
5 May 1941 HrMs O 9 (Lt. H.A.W. Goossens, RNN) conducted R.D.F. trials off Holyhead with HMS Radiant (Cdr.(Retd.) J.W. Hoskyns, RN) and HMS PC 74 (A/Cdr.(Retd.) C.E.H. White, RN). (2)
6 May 1941 HrMs O 9 (Lt. H.A.W. Goossens, RNN) conducted R.D.F. trials off Holyhead with HMS Radiant (Cdr.(Retd.) J.W. Hoskyns, RN). (2)
8 May 1941 HrMs O 9 (Lt. H.A.W. Goossens, RNN) conducted R.D.F. trials off Holyhead with HMS Radiant (Cdr.(Retd.) J.W. Hoskyns, RN) and HMS PC 74 (A/Cdr.(Retd.) C.E.H. White, RN). (2)
9 May 1941 HrMs O 9 (Lt. H.A.W. Goossens, RNN) conducted R.D.F. trials off Holyhead with HMS Radiant (Cdr.(Retd.) J.W. Hoskyns, RN) and HMS PC 74 (A/Cdr.(Retd.) C.E.H. White, RN). (2)

24 Nov 1942 HMS L 23 (Lt. R. Boyd, DSC, RN) shifted from Rothesay to Campbeltown. Off Campbeltown she conducted A/S exercises with HMS Boarhound (Skr. A. Keable, RNR) and HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (3)
29 Nov 1942 HMS L 23 (Lt. J.S. Bridger, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS Tuscarora (Lt.Cdr.(Retd.) K.W. Stewart, RN). (3)
30 Nov 1942 HMS L 23 (Lt. J.S. Bridger, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS La Cordeliere (Lt.Cdr. A.J.G. Barff, RNR) and HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (3)
1 Dec 1942 HMS L 23 (Lt. J.S. Bridger, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS La Cordeliere (Lt.Cdr. A.J.G. Barff, RNR) and HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (4)
18 Dec 1942 HMS H 50 (Lt. R.B. Forster, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS La Cordeliere (Lt.Cdr. A.J.G. Barff, RNR) and HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (5)
22 Dec 1942 HMS H 50 (Lt. R.B. Forster, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS Shemara (Cdr.(Retd.) H. Buckle, RN). (6)
23 Dec 1942 HMS H 50 (Lt. R.B. Forster, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS Boarhound (Skr. A. Keable, RNR). (5)
30 Dec 1942 HMS L 23 (Lt. A.H.B. Anderson, DSC, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS St. Modwen (Lt.Cdr. F.J. Webster, RNR). (4)
31 Dec 1942 HMS H 50 (Lt. R.B. Forster, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS Boarhound (Skr. A. Keable, RNR). (5)
1 Jan 1943 HMS H 50 (Lt. R.B. Foster, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Valena (Lt.Cdr. E. Gleave, RNR) and HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (7)
5 Jan 1943 HMS H 33 (Lt. M.H. Jupp, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS Boarhound (Skr. A. Keable, RNR). (8)
6 Jan 1943 HMS L 23 (Lt. A.H.B. Anderson, DSC, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Carina (Lt. R.A.H. Lord, RNR) and HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (9)
7 Jan 1943 HMS H 33 (Lt. M.H. Jupp, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS Boarhound (Skr. A. Keable, RNR). (8)
12 Jan 1943 HMS H 33 (Lt. M.H. Jupp, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS Boarhound (Skr. A. Keable, RNR). (8)
14 Jan 1943 HMS H 33 (Lt. M.H. Jupp, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS La Cordeliere (Lt.Cdr. A.J.G. Barff, RNR). (8)
15 Jan 1943 HMS H 33 (Lt. M.H. Jupp, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS La Cordeliere (Lt.Cdr. A.J.G. Barff, RNR). (8)
19 Jan 1943 HMS Oberon (Lt.Cdr. J.W. McCoy, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (10)
20 Jan 1943 HMS Oberon (Lt.Cdr. J.W. McCoy, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS Tuscarora (Cdr.(Retd.) K.W. Stewart, RN). (10)
21 Jan 1943 HMS H 50 (Lt. R.B. Foster, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS St. Modwen (Lt.Cdr. F.J. Webster, RNR) and HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR).
After these exercises Lt. Clarabut took command of HMS H 50 from Lt. Foster. (7)
27 Jan 1943 HMS H 50 (Lt. G.S.C. Clarabut, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS La Cordeliere (Lt.Cdr. A.J.G. Barff, RNR) and HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (7)
28 Jan 1943 HMS H 50 (Lt. G.S.C Clarabut, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS Bedlington (Skr. J.H.D. Dansie, RNR). (7)
2 Feb 1943 HMS Sealion (Lt. D.S.M. Verschoyle-Campbell, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (11)
3 Feb 1943 HMS H 43 (Lt. R. Boyd, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS St. Modwen (Lt.Cdr. F.J. Webster, RNR). (12)

4 Feb 1943 HMS H 43 (Lt. R. Boyd, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Spaniel and HMS Boarhound (Skr. A. Keable, RNR), HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS La Cordeliere (Lt.Cdr. A.J.G. Barff, RNR). (12)

5 Feb 1943 HrMs O 10 (Lt.Cdr. Baron D.T. Mackay, RNN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS La Cordeliere (Lt.Cdr. A.J.G. Barff, RNR). (13)
8 Feb 1943 HMS Sealion (Lt. D.S.M. Verschoyle-Campbell, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown. Also a practice attack was made on HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (11)

11 Feb 1943 HMS Sealion (Lt. D.S.M. Verschoyle-Campbell, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown. These were followed by a practice attack during which HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) acted as target. (11)
13 Feb 1943 HMS H 43 (Lt. D. Swanston, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS St. Modwen (Lt.Cdr. F.J. Webster, RNR). (12)
19 Feb 1943 HMS H 43 (Lt. D. Swanston, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS La Cordeliere (Lt.Cdr. A.J.G. Barff, RNR). (12)
22 Feb 1943 HMS H 43 (Lt. D. Swanston, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS L'Incomprise (Lt.Cdr.(Retd.) F.S. Deveson, RNR). (12)

10 Mar 1943 HMS Sealion (Lt. D.S.M. Verschoyle-Campbell, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS Shemara (Cdr.(Retd.) H. Buckle, RN). Upon completion of these exercises HMS Sealion proceeded to Rothesay. (14)
15 Mar 1943 HMS P 511 (Lt. C.R. Pelly, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (15)

19 Mar 1943 HMS H 50 (Lt. G.S.C Clarabut, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with (at least) HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (17)
25 Mar 1943 HMS H 33 (Lt. J.A. Spender, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (18)

2 Jan 1945 HMS H 44 (Lt. R.C. Bucknall, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Tuscarora (Lt.Cdr.(Retd.) H.T. Pitt, RN) and HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (65)
10 Jan 1945 HMS Untiring (Lt. G.E.L.F. Edsell, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS Altair (T/Lt. J.L. James, RNR). (66)
11 Jan 1945 HMS H 44 (Lt. R.C. Bucknall, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/Lt. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS Altair (T/Lt. J.L. James, RNR). (65)
12 Jan 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Shemara (Cdr.(Retd.) H. Buckle, RN) and HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (67)
14 Jan 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR). (67)
15 Jan 1945 HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. C.S.R. Shapland, RNVR) and HMS Bedlington (Skr. A.W. Peak, RNR). (67)
23 Mar 1945 HMS Vulpine (T/Lt. P.S. Thirsk, DSC, RNR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Spaniel (T/Skr. J. Bruce, RNR) and HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A. Wallace, RNVR). (68)

20 Apr 1945 HMS Unruly (T/Lt. D.J. Palmer, RNVR) briefly conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Altair (T/Lt. J.L. James, RNR) and HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A. Wallace, RNVR). The exercises were however soon cancelled. (69)
21 Apr 1945 HMS Upshot (Lt. A.J. Boyall, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS St. Modwen (T/A/Lt.Cdr. F.J.G. Rice, RNR) and HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A. Wallace, RNVR). (70)
24 Apr 1945 HMS Unruly (T/Lt. D.J. Palmer, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS St. Modwen (T/A/Lt.Cdr. F.J.G. Rice, RNR) and HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A. Wallace, RNVR). (69)
26 Apr 1945 HMS Unruly (T/Lt. D.J. Palmer, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Altair (T/Lt. J.L. James, RNR) and HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A. Wallace, RNVR). (69)
4 May 1945 HMS H 34 (Lt. A.M.B. Buxton, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS St. Modwen (T/A/Lt.Cdr. F.J.G. Rice, RNR) and HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A. Wallace, RNVR).
Following these exercises T/Lt. Tweedie took over command of HMS H34 from Lt. Buxton. (71)
6 May 1945 HMS Uproar (Lt. J.N. Devlin, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A. Wallace, RNVR) and HMS Spaniel (T/A/Skr. I.W. Sharp, RNR). (72)

11 May 1945 HMS Uproar (Lt. J.N. Devlin, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Clover (Lt. R.P. Booth, RNVR), HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A. Wallace, RNVR), HMS Carnation (T/Lt. W.R. Fowler, RNVR) and HMS Bedlington (A/Ch.Skr. A.W. Peak, RNR). (72)
16 May 1945 HMS Vitality, (Lt. W.T.J. Fox, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A. Wallace, RNVR) and HMS Bedlington (A/Ch.Skr. A.W. Peak, RNR). (73)

20 May 1945 HMS Uproar (Lt. J.N. Devlin, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Altair (T/Lt. J.L. James, RNR), HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A. Wallace, RNVR), HMS La Cordeliere (T/Lt. F.A. Haworth, RNVR) and HMS Spaniel (T/A/Skr. I.W. Sharp, RNR). (72)
5 Jun 1945 HMS Sportsman (Lt. P.L. Langley-Smith, RN) conducted A/S exercises in the Clyde area with HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A. Wallace, RNVR). (74)

1 Jul 1945 HMS Tireless (A/Lt.Cdr. M.L.C. Crawford, DSC and Bar, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A. Wallace, RNVR) and HMS L' Atlantique (Skr.Lt. C.W. Freer, RNR). (75)
20 Aug 1945 HMS Satyr (Lt. T.S. Weston, DSO, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS St. Modwen (T/A/Lt.Cdr. J. Smith, RNVR) and HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A. Wallace, RNVR). (76)
27 Aug 1945 HMS Satyr (Lt. T.S. Weston, DSO, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A. Wallace, RNVR) and HMS L' Atlantique (Skr.Lt. C.W. Freer, RNR). (76)
3 Sep 1945 HMS Una (Lt. A.M.B. Buxton, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Altair (T/Lt. J.L. James, RNR) and HMS Radiant (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A. Wallace, RNVR). (77)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
